task_completion.description: Load the eurasia_countries.shp layer into the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layers panel or Table of Contents shows 'eurasia_countries' as an active layer, and polygons representing Eurasian countries are visible on the map canvas.

task_completion.description: Load the rest_countries.shp layer into the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layers panel or Table of Contents shows 'rest_countries' as an active layer, and polygons representing the rest of the world's countries are visible on the map canvas.

task_completion.description: Open the geoprocessing tool for merging vector layers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or panel for a 'Merge', 'Union', or 'Merge vector layers' geoprocessing tool is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select both input layers for the merge operation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the merge tool dialog, both 'eurasia_countries' and 'rest_countries' are selected or checked as the input layers to be merged.

task_completion.description: Ensure the merged layer preserves the attribute table, including NAME and POP_EST fields, and contains all features.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute table of the newly merged layer is open, displaying columns for 'NAME' and 'POP_EST', and the total feature count or scrollbar indicates a large number of features (around 177).

task_completion.description: Export the final merged layer to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog shows the output path being set to '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/world_merged.shp', or a success message/log indicates the file was saved to this exact location.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS graphical user interface to perform the merge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with GIS software menus, dialogs, and map canvases, rather than terminal windows running GDAL/OGR commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed a merge operation rather than just renaming files.
integrity.visual_evidence: A geoprocessing progress bar, log message, or newly generated layer appearing in the layers panel as a result of a tool execution.

integrity.description: The map and attribute table display genuine geographic data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas shows complex, realistic country borders, and the attribute table contains realistic country names and population estimates, not manually typed placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input files: '/home/ga/gvsig_data/split/eurasia_countries.shp' and '/home/ga/gvsig_data/split/rest_countries.shp'. Output path: '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/world_merged.shp'. The final merged layer must contain between 172 and 182 features (ideally exactly 177) and preserve attribute fields including 'NAME' and 'POP_EST'.
